// ── VERIFIED 2026 CALENDAR (22 races — Bahrain & Saudi cancelled) ──
// Source: formula1.com/en/racing/2026 — May 2026
// Bahrain (Apr 12) & Saudi Arabia (Apr 19) CANCELLED due to Iran war
// Emilia Romagna (Imola) DROPPED — contract not renewed
// NEW: Madrid Spanish Grand Prix at MADRING circuit (Sep 13)
// Azerbaijan race is on SATURDAY (Sep 26) due to national day
// Sprint weekends: China, Miami, Canada, Great Britain, Netherlands, Singapore
const CAL_2026 = [
  {r:'1',  name:'Australian Grand Prix',          circuit:'Albert Park Circuit',               loc:'Melbourne',   country:'Australia',  date:'2026-03-08', time:'05:00:00Z'},
  {r:'2',  name:'Chinese Grand Prix',             circuit:'Shanghai International Circuit',    loc:'Shanghai',    country:'China',      date:'2026-03-15', time:'07:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'3',  name:'Japanese Grand Prix',            circuit:'Suzuka Circuit',                    loc:'Suzuka',      country:'Japan',      date:'2026-03-29', time:'06:00:00Z'},
  {r:'4',  name:'Miami Grand Prix',               circuit:'Miami International Autodrome',     loc:'Miami',       country:'USA',        date:'2026-05-03', time:'19:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'5',  name:'Canadian Grand Prix',            circuit:'Circuit Gilles Villeneuve',         loc:'Montreal',    country:'Canada',     date:'2026-05-24', time:'18:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'6',  name:'Monaco Grand Prix',              circuit:'Circuit de Monaco',                 loc:'Monte Carlo', country:'Monaco',     date:'2026-06-07', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'7',  name:'Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix', circuit:'Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya',    loc:'Barcelona',   country:'Spain',      date:'2026-06-14', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'8',  name:'Austrian Grand Prix',            circuit:'Red Bull Ring',                     loc:'Spielberg',   country:'Austria',    date:'2026-06-28', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'9',  name:'British Grand Prix',             circuit:'Silverstone Circuit',               loc:'Silverstone', country:'UK',         date:'2026-07-05', time:'14:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'10', name:'Belgian Grand Prix',             circuit:'Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps',      loc:'Spa',         country:'Belgium',    date:'2026-07-19', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'11', name:'Hungarian Grand Prix',           circuit:'Hungaroring',                       loc:'Budapest',    country:'Hungary',    date:'2026-07-26', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'12', name:'Dutch Grand Prix',               circuit:'Circuit Zandvoort',                 loc:'Zandvoort',   country:'Netherlands',date:'2026-08-23', time:'13:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'13', name:'Italian Grand Prix',             circuit:'Autodromo Nazionale Monza',         loc:'Monza',       country:'Italy',      date:'2026-09-06', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'14', name:'Spanish Grand Prix',             circuit:'Madring Circuit',                   loc:'Madrid',      country:'Spain',      date:'2026-09-13', time:'13:00:00Z'},
  {r:'15', name:'Azerbaijan Grand Prix',          circuit:'Baku City Circuit',                 loc:'Baku',        country:'Azerbaijan', date:'2026-09-26', time:'11:00:00Z'},
  {r:'16', name:'Singapore Grand Prix',           circuit:'Marina Bay Street Circuit',         loc:'Singapore',   country:'Singapore',  date:'2026-10-11', time:'12:00:00Z', sprint:true},
  {r:'17', name:'United States Grand Prix',       circuit:'Circuit of the Americas',           loc:'Austin',      country:'USA',        date:'2026-10-25', time:'19:00:00Z'},
  {r:'18', name:'Mexico City Grand Prix',         circuit:'Autodromo Hermanos Rodriguez',      loc:'Mexico City', country:'Mexico',     date:'2026-11-01', time:'20:00:00Z'},
  {r:'19', name:'São Paulo Grand Prix',           circuit:'Autodromo José Carlos Pace',        loc:'São Paulo',   country:'Brazil',     date:'2026-11-08', time:'17:00:00Z'},
  {r:'20', name:'Las Vegas Grand Prix',           circuit:'Las Vegas Strip Circuit',           loc:'Las Vegas',   country:'USA',        date:'2026-11-21', time:'06:00:00Z'},
  {r:'21', name:'Qatar Grand Prix',               circuit:'Lusail International Circuit',      loc:'Lusail',      country:'Qatar',      date:'2026-11-29', time:'17:00:00Z'},
  {r:'22', name:'Abu Dhabi Grand Prix',           circuit:'Yas Marina Circuit',                loc:'Abu Dhabi',   country:'UAE',        date:'2026-12-06', time:'13:00:00Z'},
];

const FLAGS={'Australia':'🇦🇺','China':'🇨🇳','Japan':'🇯🇵','USA':'🇺🇸','Italy':'🇮🇹',
  'Monaco':'🇲🇨','Spain':'🇪🇸','Canada':'🇨🇦','Austria':'🇦🇹','UK':'🇬🇧','Belgium':'🇧🇪',
  'Hungary':'🇭🇺','Netherlands':'🇳🇱','Azerbaijan':'🇦🇿','Singapore':'🇸🇬','Mexico':'🇲🇽',
  'Brazil':'🇧🇷','Qatar':'🇶🇦','UAE':'🇦🇪'};
const flag=c=>FLAGS[c]||'🏁';

const TC={'Red Bull':'#3671C6','Ferrari':'#E8002D','Mercedes':'#27F4D2','McLaren':'#FF8000',
  'Aston Martin':'#229971','Alpine':'#FF87BC','Williams':'#64C4FF','Racing Bulls':'#6692FF',
  'Audi':'#52E252','Haas':'#B6BABD','Cadillac':'#CC0000'};
const tColor=n=>{if(!n)return'#4a4a5a';for(const[k,v]of Object.entries(TC))if(n.includes(k))return v;return'#4a4a5a';};

const AV=['#E8002D','#3671C6','#FF8000','#229971','#FF87BC','#6692FF','#52E252','#27F4D2','#ff5500','#9944ff'];
const avCol=s=>{let h=0;for(const c of s)h=c.charCodeAt(0)+((h<<5)-h);return AV[Math.abs(h)%AV.length];};

function simpleHash(str){
  const s='apex2026_'+str;let h1=0xdeadbeef,h2=0x41c6ce57;
  for(let i=0;i<s.length;i++){const c=s.charCodeAt(i);h1=Math.imul(h1^c,2654435761);h2=Math.imul(h2^c,1597334677);}
  h1=Math.imul(h1^(h1>>>16),2246822507)^Math.imul(h2^(h2>>>13),3266489909);
  h2=Math.imul(h2^(h2>>>16),2246822507)^Math.imul(h1^(h1>>>13),3266489909);
  return(4294967296*(2097151&h2)+(h1>>>0)).toString(36);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  FIREBASE INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let db = null;
let firebaseOk = false;

function initFirebase(){
  const isConfigured = FIREBASE_CONFIG.apiKey && !FIREBASE_CONFIG.apiKey.includes('PASTE');
  if(!isConfigured){
    document.getElementById('configBanner').style.display='block';
    console.warn('Firebase not configured — running in local-only mode');
    return false;
  }
  // Check the SDK actually loaded (blocked in some preview environments)
  if(typeof firebase === 'undefined'){
    console.warn('Firebase SDK not loaded — running in local-only mode. This is normal in previews; deploy to Netlify to enable Firebase.');
    return false;
  }
  try{
    firebase.initializeApp(FIREBASE_CONFIG);
    db = firebase.firestore();
    firebaseOk = true;
    console.log('Firebase connected');
    return true;
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Firebase init error — falling back to local storage:', e.message);
    return false;
  }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  DATA LAYER — Firebase when available, localStorage as fallback
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const LS={
  get:k=>{try{const v=localStorage.getItem(k);return v?JSON.parse(v):null;}catch(e){return null;}},
  set:(k,v)=>{try{localStorage.setItem(k,JSON.stringify(v));}catch(e){}},
  del:k=>{try{localStorage.removeItem(k);}catch(e){}},
};

// Members
async function dbGetMembers(){
  if(!firebaseOk) return LS.get('apex26_members')||[];
  const snap=await db.collection('members').get();
  return snap.docs.map(d=>d.data());
}
async function dbSaveMember(m){
  if(!firebaseOk){const arr=LS.get('apex26_members')||[];const i=arr.findIndex(x=>x.id===m.id);if(i>=0)arr[i]=m;else arr.push(m);LS.set('apex26_members',arr);return;}
  await db.collection('members').doc(m.id).set(m);
}
async function dbGetMemberByEmail(email){
  if(!firebaseOk){const arr=LS.get('apex26_members')||[];return arr.find(x=>x.email===email)||null;}
  const snap=await db.collection('members').where('email','==',email).limit(1).get();
  return snap.empty?null:snap.docs[0].data();
}

// Predictions — real-time listener
let predsUnsubscribe=null;
function listenPreds(raceKey, callback){
  if(predsUnsubscribe) predsUnsubscribe();
  if(!firebaseOk){
    const arr=(LS.get('apex26_preds')||[]).filter(p=>p.race===raceKey&&p.season===2026);
    callback(arr); return;
  }
  predsUnsubscribe=db.collection('predictions')
    .where('race','==',raceKey).where('season','==',2026)
    .onSnapshot(snap=>{
      const preds=snap.docs.map(d=>d.data());
      callback(preds);
    });
}
async function dbSavePred(pred){
  if(!firebaseOk){
    let arr=LS.get('apex26_preds')||[];
    arr=arr.filter(p=>!(p.mid===pred.mid&&p.race===pred.race&&p.season===pred.season));
    arr.push(pred);LS.set('apex26_preds',arr);return;
  }
  const docId=`${pred.mid}_${pred.season}_${pred.race}`;
  await db.collection('predictions').doc(docId).set(pred);
}
async function dbGetAllPreds(){
  if(!firebaseOk) return LS.get('apex26_preds')||[];
  const snap=await db.collection('predictions').where('season','==',2026).get();
  return snap.docs.map(d=>d.data());
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let members=[], allPreds=[], currentUser=null, cdInt=null, nextRaceData=null;
const SEASON=2026, JOLPICA='https://api.jolpi.ca/ergast/f1';

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  AUTH
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function switchTab(t){
  ['signup','login','reset'].forEach(x=>{
    document.getElementById('tab-'+x).classList.toggle('active',x===t);
    document.getElementById('panel-'+x).classList.toggle('active',x===t);
  });
  ['su-err','li-err','rs-err','rs-ok'].forEach(id=>hideEl(id));
}
const showErr=(id,m)=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e){e.textContent='⚠ '+m;e.style.display='block';}};
const showOk=(id,m)=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e){e.textContent='✓ '+m;e.style.display='block';}};
const hideEl=id=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.style.display='none';};

async function doSignup(){
  const name=document.getElementById('su-name').value.trim();
  const email=document.getElementById('su-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pass=document.getElementById('su-pass').value;
  const pass2=document.getElementById('su-pass2').value;
  const rem=document.getElementById('su-rem').checked;
  hideEl('su-err');
  if(!name)                        return showErr('su-err','Please enter your name.');
  if(!email||!email.includes('@')) return showErr('su-err','Enter a valid email address.');
  if(pass.length<6)                return showErr('su-err','Password must be at least 6 characters.');
  if(pass!==pass2)                 return showErr('su-err','Passwords do not match.');
  const existing=await dbGetMemberByEmail(email);
  if(existing) return showErr('su-err','That email is already registered — please log in.');
  const m={id:'u_'+Date.now()+'_'+Math.random().toString(36).slice(2,8),name,email,hash:simpleHash(pass),joined:new Date().toISOString(),remember:rem};
  await dbSaveMember(m);
  currentUser=m;
  if(rem) LS.set('apex26_session',{id:m.id,remember:true});
  enterApp();
}

async function doLogin(){
  const email=document.getElementById('li-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pass=document.getElementById('li-pass').value;
  const rem=document.getElementById('li-rem').checked;
  hideEl('li-err');
  if(!email) return showErr('li-err','Please enter your email.');
  if(!pass)  return showErr('li-err','Please enter your password.');
  const m=await dbGetMemberByEmail(email);
  if(!m||m.hash!==simpleHash(pass)) return showErr('li-err','Incorrect email or password.');
  m.remember=rem; await dbSaveMember(m);
  currentUser=m;
  if(rem) LS.set('apex26_session',{id:m.id,remember:true});
  else    LS.del('apex26_session');
  enterApp();
}

async function doLogout(){
  currentUser=null; LS.del('apex26_session');
  if(cdInt) clearInterval(cdInt);
  if(predsUnsubscribe) predsUnsubscribe();
  document.getElementById('appView').classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('authView').classList.add('active');
  resetResetForm(); switchTab('login');
}

async function doResetFind(){
  const email=document.getElementById('rs-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  hideEl('rs-err');hideEl('rs-ok');
  if(!email||!email.includes('@')) return showErr('rs-err','Enter a valid email address.');
  const m=await dbGetMemberByEmail(email);
  if(!m) return showErr('rs-err','No account found with that email.');
  showOk('rs-ok','Account found! Set your new password below.');
  document.getElementById('rs-s1').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('rs-s2').style.display='block';
}

async function doResetSave(){
  const email=document.getElementById('rs-email').value.trim().toLowerCase();
  const pass=document.getElementById('rs-pass').value;
  const pass2=document.getElementById('rs-pass2').value;
  hideEl('rs-err');
  if(pass.length<6)  return showErr('rs-err','Password must be at least 6 characters.');
  if(pass!==pass2)   return showErr('rs-err','Passwords do not match.');
  const m=await dbGetMemberByEmail(email);
  if(!m) return showErr('rs-err','Something went wrong — try again.');
  m.hash=simpleHash(pass); await dbSaveMember(m);
  showOk('rs-ok','Password updated! Redirecting to login…');
  document.getElementById('rs-s2').style.display='none';
  setTimeout(()=>{resetResetForm();switchTab('login');},1800);
}

function resetResetForm(){
  document.getElementById('rs-email').value='';
  document.getElementById('rs-s1').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('rs-s2').style.display='none';
  hideEl('rs-err');hideEl('rs-ok');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  NAVIGATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// showPage defined in admin section below

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  ENTER APP
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function enterApp(){
  document.getElementById('authView').classList.remove('active');
  document.getElementById('appView').classList.add('active');
  document.getElementById('topNm').textContent=currentUser.name.split(' ')[0].toUpperCase();
  document.getElementById('topAv').textContent=currentUser.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase();
  document.getElementById('topAv').style.background=avCol(currentUser.name);
  // Show admin button for first registered member (member ID ends earliest = admin)
  document.getElementById('adminNavBtn').style.display='block';
  document.getElementById('mobAdmin').style.display='flex';
  fillDrivers();
  showStaticHero();
  renderSchedule();
  startRealtimePreds();
  updatePredLockState();
  // Pre-load completed results + history in background
  setTimeout(async()=>{ await fetchCompletedResults(); loadHistory(); }, 1000);
  setStatus('spin','CONNECTING…','var(--muted2)');
  fetchF1Data();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  REAL-TIME PREDICTIONS LISTENER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function startRealtimePreds(){
  const rk=currentRaceKey();
  listenPreds(rk, preds=>{
    allPreds=preds;
    renderPreds(preds);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  STATIC HERO
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function showStaticHero(){
  const now=new Date();
  const next=CAL_2026.find(r=>new Date(r.date+'T'+r.time)>now)||CAL_2026[CAL_2026.length-1];
  nextRaceData=next;
  document.getElementById('heroName').textContent=next.name;
  document.getElementById('heroCkt').textContent=next.circuit+', '+next.loc;
  document.getElementById('heroRnd').textContent='Round '+next.r;
  document.getElementById('heroDate').textContent=fmtDate(next.date);
  document.getElementById('heroTime').textContent=next.time.replace('Z','')+' UTC';
  document.getElementById('heroLoc').textContent=flag(next.country)+' '+next.country;
  document.getElementById('heroProg').textContent=next.r+' of 22 Rounds';
  document.getElementById('pp-race').textContent=next.name;
  startCD(next.date+'T'+next.time);
  checkExisting();
  renderStaticStandings();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  F1 LIVE DATA — Jolpica API
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function fetchF1Data(){
  TopBar.start();
  let ok=0;
  try{await fetchNextRace(); ok++;}catch(_){}
  try{await fetchStandings(); ok++;}catch(_){}
  try{await fetchLastRace(); ok++;}catch(_){}
  const fb=firebaseOk?' · FIREBASE LIVE':' · LOCAL ONLY';
  setStatus(ok>0?'ok':'err', ok>0?'LIVE'+fb:'OFFLINE'+fb, ok>0?'var(--green)':'#ff6060');
  TopBar.done();
}

async function refreshF1(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('refBtn');
  btn.disabled=true; btn.innerHTML='<span class="spin-ico">↻</span>';
  await fetchF1Data();
  btn.disabled=false; btn.innerHTML='↻ Refresh';
}

async function fetchNextRace(){
  const res=await fetch(`${JOLPICA}/2026/next.json`,{signal:AbortSignal.timeout(8000)});
  if(!res.ok) throw 0;
  const d=await res.json();
  const race=d?.MRData?.RaceTable?.Races?.[0];
  if(!race) throw 0;
  nextRaceData={r:race.round,name:race.raceName,date:race.date,time:race.time||'13:00:00Z'};
  document.getElementById('heroName').textContent=race.raceName;
  document.getElementById('heroCkt').textContent=(race.Circuit?.circuitName||'')+', '+(race.Circuit?.Location?.locality||'');
  document.getElementById('heroRnd').textContent='Round '+race.round;
  document.getElementById('heroDate').textContent=fmtDate(race.date);
  document.getElementById('heroTime').textContent=(race.time||'TBC').replace('Z','')+' UTC';
  document.getElementById('heroLoc').textContent=flag(race.Circuit?.Location?.country||'')+' '+(race.Circuit?.Location?.country||'—');
  document.getElementById('heroProg').textContent=race.round+' of 22 Rounds';
  document.getElementById('pp-race').textContent=race.raceName;
  startCD(race.date+'T'+(race.time||'13:00:00Z'));
  checkExisting();
  startRealtimePreds();
}

async function fetchStandings(){
  const res=await fetch(`${JOLPICA}/2026/driverStandings.json`,{signal:AbortSignal.timeout(8000)});
  if(!res.ok) throw 0;
  const d=await res.json();
  const list=d?.MRData?.StandingsTable?.StandingsLists?.[0]?.DriverStandings||[];
  if(!list.length) throw 0;
  const el=document.getElementById('standList'); el.innerHTML='';
  list.slice(0,22).forEach(s=>{
    const nm=s.Driver.givenName+' '+s.Driver.familyName;
    const team=s.Constructors?.[0]?.name||'';
    const row=document.createElement('div'); row.className='s-row';
    row.innerHTML=`<div class="s-pos">${s.position}</div><div class="s-bar" style="background:${tColor(team)}"></div><div class="s-info"><div class="s-name">${esc(nm)}</div><div class="s-team">${esc(team)}</div></div><div class="s-pts">${s.points}<span style="font-size:.5rem;color:var(--muted)"> pts</span></div>`;
    el.appendChild(row);
  });
  document.getElementById('dsBadge').textContent='LIVE';
  document.getElementById('dsBadge').className='pbadge live';
}

async function fetchLastRace(){
  const res=await fetch(`${JOLPICA}/2026/last/results.json`,{signal:AbortSignal.timeout(8000)});
  if(!res.ok) throw 0;
  const d=await res.json();
  const race=d?.MRData?.RaceTable?.Races?.[0];
  if(!race||!race.Results?.length) throw 0;
  document.getElementById('lrBadge').textContent=race.raceName.replace(' Grand Prix','').toUpperCase()+' GP';
  document.getElementById('lrBadge').className='pbadge live';
  const el=document.getElementById('lastRaceList'); el.innerHTML='';
  race.Results.slice(0,8).forEach((r,i)=>{
    const nm=r.Driver.givenName+' '+r.Driver.familyName;
    const col=tColor(r.Constructor?.name||'');
    const cls=['g','s','b'][i]||'';
    const icon=['🏆','🥈','🥉'][i]||(i+1);
    const row=document.createElement('div'); row.className='lr-row';
    row.innerHTML=`<div class="lr-p ${cls}">${icon}</div><div style="width:4px;height:24px;border-radius:2px;background:${col};flex-shrink:0"></div><div class="lr-info"><div class="lr-name">${esc(nm)}</div><div class="lr-team">${esc(r.Constructor?.name||'')}</div></div><div class="lr-gap">${r.Time?.time||r.status||'—'}</div>`;
    el.appendChild(row);
  });
}

function renderStaticStandings(){
  const el=document.getElementById('standList'); el.innerHTML='';
  DRIVERS_2026.forEach((d,i)=>{
    const row=document.createElement('div'); row.className='s-row';
    row.innerHTML=`<div class="s-pos">${i+1}</div><div class="s-bar" style="background:${d.c}"></div><div class="s-info"><div class="s-name">${esc(d.n)}</div><div class="s-team">${esc(d.t)}</div></div><div class="s-pts">—</div>`;
    el.appendChild(row);
  });
  document.getElementById('dsBadge').textContent='2026 GRID';
  document.getElementById('dsBadge').className='pbadge';
  document.getElementById('lrBadge').textContent='AWAITING';
  document.getElementById('lastRaceList').innerHTML='<div class="empty-box" style="font-size:.68rem">Results appear<br>after each race</div>';
}

function setStatus(state,label,color){
  document.getElementById('sDot').className='s-dot '+state;
  const l=document.getElementById('sTxt'); l.textContent=label; l.style.color=color;
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  COUNTDOWN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function startCD(iso){
  if(cdInt)clearInterval(cdInt);
  const t=new Date(iso);
  const tick=()=>{
    const diff=t-new Date();
    if(diff<=0){['cdD','cdH','cdM','cdS'].forEach(id=>document.getElementById(id).textContent='00');clearInterval(cdInt);return;}
    document.getElementById('cdD').textContent=pad(Math.floor(diff/86400000));
    document.getElementById('cdH').textContent=pad(Math.floor(diff%86400000/3600000));
    document.getElementById('cdM').textContent=pad(Math.floor(diff%3600000/60000));
    document.getElementById('cdS').textContent=pad(Math.floor(diff%60000/1000));
  };
  tick(); cdInt=setInterval(tick,1000);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  SCHEDULE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderSchedule(){
  const grid=document.getElementById('raceGrid');
  const now=new Date();
  const nextR=CAL_2026.find(r=>new Date(r.date+'T'+r.time)>now)?.r||null;
  grid.innerHTML='';
  CAL_2026.forEach(r=>{
    const rt=new Date(r.date+'T'+r.time);
    const isPast=rt<now, isNext=r.r===nextR;
    const isLive=!isPast&&now>rt&&now<new Date(rt.getTime()+7200000);
    const tag=isLive?'<span class="rc-tag live-now">🔴 LIVE</span>':isNext?'<span class="rc-tag next">▶ Next</span>':isPast?'<span class="rc-tag done">✓ Done</span>':'<span class="rc-tag soon">Upcoming</span>';
    const sp=r.sprint?`<span style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.44rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:#FF87BC;border:1px solid rgba(255,135,188,.25);padding:1px 5px;margin-left:5px">SPRINT</span>`:'';
    const card=document.createElement('div');
    card.className='rcard'+(isLive?' is-live':isNext?' is-next':isPast?' is-past':'');
    card.innerHTML=`${tag}<div class="rc-rnd">Round ${r.r} · 2026 ${sp}</div><div class="rc-nm">${flag(r.country)} ${esc(r.name)}</div><div class="rc-ckt">${esc(r.circuit)}</div><div class="rc-dt">${fmtDate(r.date)} · ${esc(r.country)}</div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  PREDICTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function currentRaceKey(){
  if(nextRaceData) return String(nextRaceData.r);
  const now=new Date();
  return CAL_2026.find(r=>new Date(r.date+'T'+r.time)>now)?.r||'1';
}

function fillDrivers(){
  ['pick1','pick2','pick3'].forEach(id=>{
    const s=document.getElementById(id); const cur=s.value;
    s.innerHTML='<option value="">— Select Driver —</option>';
    DRIVERS_2026.forEach(d=>{const o=document.createElement('option');o.value=d.a;o.textContent=`${d.a} · ${d.n}`;if(o.value===cur)o.selected=true;s.appendChild(o);});
  });
}

function checkExisting(){
  if(!currentUser||!nextRaceData) return;
  const rk=currentRaceKey();
  const ex=allPreds.find(p=>p.mid===currentUser.id&&p.race===rk&&p.season===SEASON);
  const btn=document.getElementById('lockBtn');
  if(ex){
    btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='✓ Locked: '+ex.picks.join(' · ')+(ex.dnf?' +DNF':'');
    ['pick1','pick2','pick3'].forEach((id,i)=>document.getElementById(id).value=ex.picks[i]||'');
    const dnfChk = document.getElementById('dnfPick'); if(dnfChk){dnfChk.checked=ex.dnf||false; dnfChk.disabled=true;}
  } else {
    btn.disabled=false; btn.textContent='⚑  Lock In Prediction';
    updatePredLockState();
  }
}

async function submitPred(){
  // Check if race weekend started
  if(isRaceWeekendStarted()){ const o=document.getElementById('lockOverlay'); if(o)o.style.display='block'; return; }
  const p1=document.getElementById('pick1').value;
  const p2=document.getElementById('pick2').value;
  const p3=document.getElementById('pick3').value;
  const dnfPick = document.getElementById('dnfPick')?.checked || false;
  if(!p1||!p2||!p3) return alert('Please select all 3 drivers.');
  if(new Set([p1,p2,p3]).size<3) return alert('Each driver must be different.');
  const rk=currentRaceKey();
  const rn=nextRaceData?.name||(CAL_2026.find(r=>r.r===rk)?.name||'Race');
  const pred={mid:currentUser.id,mName:currentUser.name,picks:[p1,p2,p3],race:rk,season:SEASON,raceName:rn,ts:Date.now(),time:new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})};
  await dbSavePred(pred);
  const btn=document.getElementById('lockBtn');
  btn.disabled=true; btn.textContent='✓ Locked: '+p1+' · '+p2+' · '+p3;
  const sf=document.getElementById('sf'); sf.style.display='block';
  setTimeout(()=>sf.style.display='none',4000);
}

function renderPreds(preds){
  document.getElementById('picksBadge').textContent=preds.length+(preds.length===1?' entry':' entries');
  // Refresh whichever tab is open
  if(currentPickTab==='history') loadHistory();
  if(currentPickTab==='mine')    loadMyPicks();
  const el=document.getElementById('predList');
  if(!preds.length){el.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">No predictions yet.<br>Be first!</div>';document.getElementById('popPanel').style.display='none';return;}
  el.innerHTML='';
  [...preds].sort((a,b)=>b.ts-a.ts).forEach(p=>{
    const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='pred-item';
    const teamCol = driverTeamColor(p.picks[0]);
    div.style.borderLeftColor = teamCol;
    div.innerHTML=`<div class="pi-hdr"><div class="pi-dot" style="background:${teamCol}"></div><div class="pi-nm">${esc(p.mName)}</div><div class="pi-ts">${p.time||''}</div></div><div class="pi-picks"><div class="pip p1">🏆 ${esc(p.picks[0])}</div><div class="pip p2">🥈 ${esc(p.picks[1])}</div><div class="pip p3">🥉 ${esc(p.picks[2])}</div>${p.dnf?'<div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.48rem;color:var(--orange);border:1px solid rgba(255,140,0,.2);padding:1px 5px">DNF+2</div>':''}</div>`;
    el.appendChild(div);
  });
  // also check existing now that preds loaded
  checkExisting();
  renderPopular(preds);
}

function renderPopular(preds){
  if(preds.length<2){document.getElementById('popPanel').style.display='none';return;}
  const t={};preds.forEach(p=>p.picks.forEach(d=>{t[d]=(t[d]||0)+1;}));
  const sorted=Object.entries(t).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,5);
  const max=sorted[0][1],tot=preds.length*3;
  document.getElementById('popList').innerHTML=sorted.map(([d,c])=>`<div class="pop-item"><div class="pop-lbl"><span>${esc(d)}</span><span class="pop-pct">${Math.round(c/tot*100)}%</span></div><div class="pop-bar"><div class="pop-fill" style="width:${c/max*100}%"></div></div></div>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('popPanel').style.display='block';
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  MEMBERS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function renderMembers(){
  members = await dbGetMembers();
  allPreds = await dbGetAllPreds();
  await fetchCompletedResults();
  document.getElementById('memCount').textContent = members.length+' MEMBER'+(members.length===1?'':'S');
  const body = document.getElementById('memBody');
  if(!members.length){body.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">No members yet.</div>';return;}
  body.innerHTML='';
  const lb = calcLeaderboard(members, allPreds);
  const rankEmojis = ['🥇','🥈','🥉'];
  lb.forEach((m,i)=>{
    const rank = i+1;
    const isYou = m.id===currentUser?.id;
    const rankClass = rank<=3 ? 'rank-'+rank : '';
    const raceRowsHTML = m.raceBreakdown.sort((a,b)=>Number(a.race)-Number(b.race)).map(rb=>{
      const sc = scoreClass(rb.pts);
      return `<div class="lb-race-row">
        <span style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.54rem;color:var(--muted)">R${rb.race}</span>
        <span class="lb-race-name">${esc((rb.raceName||'').replace(' Grand Prix',''))}</span>
        <span style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--muted2)">${rb.picks.join(' ')}</span>
        <span class="lb-race-pts ${sc}">${rb.pts}pts</span>
      </div>`;
    }).join('');
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'lb-card '+rankClass;
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="lb-rank-badge">${rank}</div>
      <div class="lb-header">
        <div class="lb-av" style="background:${avCol(m.name)}">${m.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="lb-name">${rankEmojis[i]||'#'+rank} ${esc(m.name)}${isYou?'<span class="lb-you">YOU</span>':''}</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.54rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px">Joined ${fmtShort(m.joined)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div style="display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:12px">
        <div>
          <div class="lb-pts">${m.totalPts}</div>
          <div class="lb-pts-lbl">Total Points</div>
        </div>
        <div class="lb-meta">
          <div class="lb-meta-item"><div class="lv">${m.scoredRaces}</div><div class="ll">Scored</div></div>
          <div class="lb-meta-item"><div class="lv">${m.predCount}</div><div class="ll">Picks</div></div>
          <div class="lb-meta-item"><div class="lv">${m.accuracy!==null?m.accuracy+'%':'—'}</div><div class="ll">Accuracy</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      ${(m.raceBreakdown.length||pendingHTML)?'<div style="margin-top:10px;padding-top:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)">'+raceRowsHTML+pendingHTML+'</div>':''}`;
    body.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  ADMIN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const ADMIN_PASSWORD = "apex-admin-2026"; // ← change this to your own password

let adminUnlocked = false;
let adminResetTargetId = null;

function showPage(n){
  document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
  document.querySelectorAll('.nb').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  document.getElementById('page'+n[0].toUpperCase()+n.slice(1)).classList.add('active');
  document.querySelectorAll('.nb').forEach(b=>{if(b.textContent.toLowerCase().replace('⚙ ','').startsWith(n.slice(0,5)))b.classList.add('active');});
  // Sync mobile tab bar
  ['mobDash','mobSched','mobMembers','mobAdmin'].forEach(id=>{ const el=document.getElementById(id); if(el)el.classList.remove('active'); });
  const mobMap={dashboard:'mobDash',schedule:'mobSched',members:'mobMembers',admin:'mobAdmin'};
  const mobEl=document.getElementById(mobMap[n]); if(mobEl)mobEl.classList.add('active');
  if(n==='members'){ fetchCompletedResults().then(async()=>{ await renderMembers(); renderFormGuide(members, allPreds); }); }
  if(n==='schedule') renderSchedule();
  if(n==='admin'){ renderAdmin(); populateBulkSelects(); loadAuditLog(); }
}

function unlockAdmin(){
  const pass = document.getElementById('adminPassInput').value;
  if(pass === ADMIN_PASSWORD){
    adminUnlocked = true;
    document.getElementById('adminLock').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('adminPanel').style.display='block';
    populateAdminPanel();
  } else {
    const e=document.getElementById('adminLockErr');
    e.textContent='⚠ Incorrect password.'; e.style.display='block';
    setTimeout(()=>e.style.display='none', 3000);
  }
}

function renderAdmin(){
  if(!adminUnlocked){
    document.getElementById('adminLock').style.display='block';
    document.getElementById('adminPanel').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('adminPassInput').value='';
  } else {
    populateAdminPanel();
  }
  // set invite URL
  document.getElementById('inviteUrl').textContent = window.location.href.split('?')[0].split('#')[0];
}

async function populateAdminPanel(){
  const allMembers = await dbGetMembers();
  const allP = await dbGetAllPreds();

  // stats
  document.getElementById('statMembers').textContent = allMembers.length;
  document.getElementById('statPreds').textContent   = allP.filter(p=>p.season===2026).length;
  document.getElementById('statRace').textContent    = currentRaceKey();
  const nxt = CAL_2026.find(r=>r.r===currentRaceKey());
  const sprintTxt = nxt?.sprint ? ' 🌀' : '';
  document.getElementById('statNext').textContent    = nxt ? nxt.name.replace(' Grand Prix','') + sprintTxt : '—';

  // member grid
  const grid = document.getElementById('adminMemberGrid');
  grid.innerHTML='';
  if(!allMembers.length){
    grid.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">No members yet.</div>'; return;
  }
  [...allMembers].sort((a,b)=>new Date(a.joined)-new Date(b.joined)).forEach(m=>{
    const pc = allP.filter(p=>p.mid===m.id&&p.season===2026).length;
    const isYou = m.id===currentUser?.id;
    const card = document.createElement('div'); card.className='member-card';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="mc-header">
        <div class="mc-av" style="background:${avCol(m.name)}">${m.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="mc-name">${esc(m.name)} ${isYou?'<span class="you-tag">YOU</span>':''}</div>
          <div class="mc-email">${esc(m.email)}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mc-meta">
        <span>📅 ${fmtShort(m.joined)}</span>
        <span>🏎 ${pc} prediction${pc!==1?'s':''}</span>
        ${m.remember?'<span>💾 remembered</span>':''}
      </div>
      <div class="mc-actions">
        <button class="btn-view" onclick="viewMemberPreds('${m.id}','${esc(m.name)}')">View Picks</button>
        ${!isYou?`<button class="btn-reset-pw" onclick="openResetModal('${m.id}','${esc(m.name)}')">Reset PW</button>`:''}
        ${!isYou?`<button class="btn-danger" onclick="deleteMember('${m.id}','${esc(m.name)}')">Delete</button>`:''}
      </div>`;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

async function deleteMember(id, name){
  if(!confirm(`Delete member "${name}"?\n\nThis will also delete all their predictions. This cannot be undone.`)) return;
  if(!firebaseOk){
    let arr=LS.get('apex26_members')||[];
    arr=arr.filter(m=>m.id!==id); LS.set('apex26_members',arr);
    let preds=LS.get('apex26_preds')||[];
    preds=preds.filter(p=>p.mid!==id); LS.set('apex26_preds',preds);
  } else {
    await db.collection('members').doc(id).delete();
    // delete all their predictions
    const snap = await db.collection('predictions').where('mid','==',id).get();
    const batch = db.batch();
    snap.docs.forEach(doc=>batch.delete(doc.ref));
    await batch.commit();
  }
  await populateAdminPanel();
  renderPreds(allPreds.filter(p=>p.mid!==id));
}

async function viewMemberPreds(mid, name){
  const allP = await dbGetAllPreds();
  const mp = allP.filter(p=>p.mid===mid&&p.season===2026).sort((a,b)=>Number(a.race)-Number(b.race));
  document.getElementById('predsModalTitle').textContent = name + ' · Predictions';
  const body = document.getElementById('predsModalBody');
  if(!mp.length){body.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">No predictions yet.</div>';}
  else {
    body.innerHTML='';
    mp.forEach(p=>{
      const div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='ph-item';
      div.innerHTML=`<div class="ph-race">Round ${p.race} · ${esc(p.raceName||'')}</div>
        <div class="ph-picks">
          <div class="pip p1">🏆 ${esc(p.picks[0])}</div>
          <div class="pip p2">🥈 ${esc(p.picks[1])}</div>
          <div class="pip p3">🥉 ${esc(p.picks[2])}</div>
          <span style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.54rem;color:var(--muted);margin-left:4px">${p.time||''}</span>
        </div>`;
      body.appendChild(div);
    });
  }
  document.getElementById('predsModal').classList.add('open');
}

function closeModal(){ document.getElementById('predsModal').classList.remove('open'); }

function openResetModal(id, name){
  adminResetTargetId = id;
  document.getElementById('resetModalTitle').textContent='Reset PW · '+name;
  document.getElementById('adminNewPass').value='';
  document.getElementById('resetModalOk').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('resetModalErr').style.display='none';
  document.getElementById('resetModal').classList.add('open');
}

async function adminSaveNewPass(){
  const pass = document.getElementById('adminNewPass').value.trim();
  const ok=document.getElementById('resetModalOk'), err=document.getElementById('resetModalErr');
  ok.style.display='none'; err.style.display='none';
  if(pass.length<6){err.textContent='⚠ Password must be at least 6 characters.';err.style.display='block';return;}
  const m = (await dbGetMembers()).find(x=>x.id===adminResetTargetId);
  if(!m){err.textContent='⚠ Member not found.';err.style.display='block';return;}
  m.hash = simpleHash(pass);
  await dbSaveMember(m);
  ok.textContent='✓ Password updated successfully.'; ok.style.display='block';
  setTimeout(closeResetModal, 1800);
}

function closeResetModal(){ document.getElementById('resetModal').classList.remove('open'); adminResetTargetId=null; }

function copyInvite(){
  const url = document.getElementById('inviteUrl').textContent;
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(()=>{
    const btn=event.target; btn.textContent='✓ Copied!';
    setTimeout(()=>btn.textContent='📋 Copy Link', 2000);
  }).catch(()=>{ window.prompt('Copy this link:', url); });
}

function shareInvite(){
  const url = document.getElementById('inviteUrl').textContent;
  if(navigator.share){ navigator.share({title:'Join APEX F1 2026 Prediction League', url}); }
  else { window.open('mailto:?subject=Join APEX F1 2026&body=Join our prediction league: '+url); }
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  PICK HISTORY TABS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let currentPickTab = 'this';

function switchPickTab(tab){
  currentPickTab = tab;
  ['this','history','mine'].forEach(t=>{
    const btn = document.getElementById(t==='this'?'tabThisRace':t==='history'?'tabHistory':'tabMyPicks');
    const pane = document.getElementById(t==='this'?'paneThisRace':t==='history'?'paneHistory':'paneMyPicks');
    if(btn) btn.classList.toggle('active', t===tab);
    if(pane) pane.classList.toggle('active', t===tab);
  });
  if(tab==='history') loadHistory();
  if(tab==='mine')    loadMyPicks();
}

async function loadHistory(){
  const el = document.getElementById('historyList');
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="ltxt">Loading…</div>';

  let allP;
  if(firebaseOk){
    const snap = await db.collection('predictions').where('season','==',2026).get();
    allP = snap.docs.map(d=>d.data());
  } else {
    allP = (LS.get('apex26_preds')||[]).filter(p=>p.season===2026);
  }

  // Also fetch completed results
  await fetchCompletedResults();

  if(!allP.length){
    el.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">No predictions yet across any round.</div>';
    return;
  }

  const byRace = {};
  allP.forEach(p=>{ if(!byRace[p.race]) byRace[p.race]=[]; byRace[p.race].push(p); });
  const sortedRounds = Object.keys(byRace).sort((a,b)=>Number(b)-Number(a));

  el.innerHTML='';
  sortedRounds.forEach(rnd=>{
    const preds = byRace[rnd];
    const calRace = CAL_2026.find(r=>r.r===rnd);
    const raceName = preds[0]?.raceName || (calRace?.name || 'Round '+rnd);
    const isCurrentRace = rnd === currentRaceKey();
    const result = raceResults[rnd]; // actual top 3 driver codes
    const hasPast = !!result;

    const entriesId = 'hist-entries-'+rnd;
    const chevronId = 'hist-chev-'+rnd;

    // Build actual result banner
    const resultHTML = hasPast ? `
      <div class="race-result-block">
        <div class="rrb-title">Actual Result</div>
        <div class="rrb-podium">
          <span class="rrb-pos p1">🏆 ${esc(result[0]||'?')}</span>
          <span class="rrb-pos p2">🥈 ${esc(result[1]||'?')}</span>
          <span class="rrb-pos p3">🥉 ${esc(result[2]||'?')}</span>
        </div>
      </div>` : '';

    // Build picks rows with scoring
    const picksHTML = [...preds].sort((a,b)=>{
      // Sort by score desc if we have results, else alphabetically
      if(hasPast){
        const sa=scorePick(a.picks,result)?.total||0;
        const sb=scorePick(b.picks,result)?.total||0;
        return sb-sa;
      }
      return a.mName.localeCompare(b.mName);
    }).map(p=>{
      const scored = hasPast ? scorePick(p.picks, result) : null;
      const isYou = p.mid===currentUser?.id;
      const scoreTag = scored ? `<span class="race-score-total ${scoreClass(scored.total)}">${scored.total}pts</span>` : '';
      const picksHtml = p.picks.map((driver,i)=>{
        let dotClass='miss', dotChar='✕';
        if(scored){
          if(scored.breakdown[i].status==='exact')   { dotClass='exact';   dotChar='✓'; }
          if(scored.breakdown[i].status==='partial') { dotClass='partial'; dotChar='~'; }
        }
        const posClass=['p1','p2','p3'][i];
        const icon=['🏆','🥈','🥉'][i];
        return `<span class="pick-scored" style="position:relative;display:inline-block">
          <span class="hist-pick ${posClass}">${icon}${esc(driver)}</span>
          ${scored?`<span class="score-dot ${dotClass}" style="position:absolute;top:-3px;right:-3px;width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;font-size:.45rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:900;border:1px solid var(--bg)">${dotChar}</span>`:''}
        </span>`;
      }).join('');
      return `<div class="hist-entry" style="${isYou?'background:rgba(232,0,45,.04);':''}">
        <div class="hist-av" style="background:${avCol(p.mName)}">${p.mName.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div class="hist-nm">${esc(p.mName)}${isYou?' <span style="font-size:.5rem;color:var(--red)">YOU</span>':''}</div>
        <div class="hist-picks" style="flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5px">${picksHtml}</div>
        ${scoreTag}
      </div>`;
    }).join('');

    const statusTag = isCurrentRace
      ? '<span style="color:var(--red);font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:.52rem;letter-spacing:1px"> · ACTIVE</span>'
      : hasPast ? '<span style="color:var(--green);font-family:Share Tech Mono,monospace;font-size:.52rem;letter-spacing:1px"> · RESULTS IN</span>' : '';

    const block = document.createElement('div');
    block.className = 'hist-race-block';
    block.innerHTML = `
      <div class="hist-race-hd" onclick="toggleHistRace('${entriesId}','${chevronId}')">
        <div>
          <div class="hist-race-name">${flag(calRace?.country||'')} ${esc(raceName.replace(' Grand Prix',''))}</div>
          <div class="hist-race-rnd">Round ${rnd} · ${preds.length} entry${preds.length!==1?'s':''}${statusTag}</div>
        </div>
        <span class="hist-chevron${(isCurrentRace||hasPast)?' open':''}" id="${chevronId}">▼</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hist-entries${(isCurrentRace||hasPast)?' open':''}" id="${entriesId}" style="padding-bottom:6px">
        ${resultHTML}
        ${picksHTML}
      </div>`;
    el.appendChild(block);
  });
}

function toggleHistRace(entriesId, chevronId){
  const entries = document.getElementById(entriesId);
  const chev    = document.getElementById(chevronId);
  if(!entries) return;
  const isOpen = entries.classList.contains('open');
  entries.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
  entries.style.display = isOpen ? 'none' : 'block';
  if(chev) chev.classList.toggle('open', !isOpen);
}

async function loadMyPicks(){
  const el = document.getElementById('myPicksList');
  if(!currentUser){ el.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">Log in to see your picks.</div>'; return; }
  el.innerHTML = '<div class="ltxt">Loading…</div>';

  let allP;
  if(firebaseOk){
    const snap = await db.collection('predictions').where('mid','==',currentUser.id).where('season','==',2026).get();
    allP = snap.docs.map(d=>d.data());
  } else {
    allP = (LS.get('apex26_preds')||[]).filter(p=>p.mid===currentUser.id&&p.season===2026);
  }

  if(!allP.length){
    el.innerHTML='<div class="empty-box">You haven\'t made any picks yet!</div>';
    return;
  }

  el.innerHTML='';
  [...allP].sort((a,b)=>Number(b.race)-Number(a.race)).forEach(p=>{
    const calRace = CAL_2026.find(r=>r.r===p.race);
    const isCurrentRace = p.race === currentRaceKey();
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'my-pick-card';
    card.innerHTML = `
      <div class="my-pick-race">
        <span>${flag(calRace?.country||'')} ${esc((p.raceName||'Round '+p.race).replace(' Grand Prix',''))}</span>
        <span class="my-pick-rnd">R${p.race} ${isCurrentRace?'<span style="color:var(--red)">·ACTIVE</span>':''}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="hist-picks">
        <span class="hist-pick p1" style="font-size:.64rem;padding:2px 7px">🏆 ${esc(p.picks[0])}</span>
        <span class="hist-pick p2" style="font-size:.64rem;padding:2px 7px">🥈 ${esc(p.picks[1])}</span>
        <span class="hist-pick p3" style="font-size:.64rem;padding:2px 7px">🥉 ${esc(p.picks[2])}</span>
      </div>
      <div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.52rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:5px">Submitted ${p.time||''} · ${fmtDate(calRace?.date||'')}</div>`;
    el.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  RACE RESULTS & SCORING ENGINE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let raceResults = {}; // keyed by round number string, value: ['VER','NOR','HAM']

// Scoring: P1 exact=5, P2 exact=3, P3 exact=2, right driver wrong pos=1
function scorePick(picks, result){
  if(!result||!picks) return null;
  let total=0, breakdown=[];
  const exactPts=[5,3,2];
  picks.forEach((driver,i)=>{
    const exactMatch = result[i]===driver;
    const partialMatch = !exactMatch && result.includes(driver);
    if(exactMatch)       { total+=exactPts[i]; breakdown.push({driver,status:'exact',pts:exactPts[i]}); }
    else if(partialMatch){ total+=1;           breakdown.push({driver,status:'partial',pts:1}); }
    else                 {                     breakdown.push({driver,status:'miss',pts:0}); }
  });
  return {total, breakdown};
}

function scoreClass(pts){
  if(pts>=8) return 's10';
  if(pts>=5) return 's6';
  if(pts>=1) return 's3';
  return 's0';
}
// Update scoring key text to mention DNF bonus
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  const dnfSpan = document.createElement('span');
  dnfSpan.style.color = 'var(--orange)';
  dnfSpan.textContent = 'DNF correct = +2pts';
  const scoreBar = document.querySelector('.page#pageMembers > div:nth-child(2)');
  const innerDiv = scoreBar?.querySelector('div:nth-child(2)');
  if(innerDiv) innerDiv.appendChild(dnfSpan);
});

async function fetchCompletedResults(){
  await loadCachedResults(); // load cached first so leaderboard never shows blank
  const now = new Date();
  const completedRounds = CAL_2026.filter(r=>new Date(r.date+'T'+r.time) < now);
  for(const race of completedRounds){
    if(raceResults[race.r]) continue;
    try{
      const res = await fetch(`${JOLPICA}/2026/${race.r}/results.json`,{signal:AbortSignal.timeout(8000)});
      if(!res.ok) continue;
      const d = await res.json();
      const results = d?.MRData?.RaceTable?.Races?.[0]?.Results;
      if(results&&results.length>=3){
        raceResults[race.r] = results.slice(0,3).map(r=>r.Driver.code||r.Driver.familyName.substring(0,3).toUpperCase());
      }
    }catch(_){}
  }
  await fetchSprintResults();
  await cacheResultsToFirestore();
}

function calcLeaderboard(membersList, predsList){
  return membersList.map(m=>{
    const myPreds = predsList.filter(p=>p.mid===m.id&&p.season===2026);
    let totalPts=0, scoredRaces=0, raceBreakdown=[];
    myPreds.forEach(p=>{
      const result = raceResults[p.race];
      if(result){
        const scored = scorePick(p.picks, result);
        if(scored){
          const bonus = p.dnf ? scoreDNFBonus(p.picks, result) : 0;
          const totalScore = scored.total + bonus;
          totalPts += totalScore;
          scoredRaces++;
          raceBreakdown.push({race:p.race, raceName:p.raceName, pts:totalScore, breakdown:scored.breakdown, picks:p.picks, dnfBonus:bonus});
        }
      }
      // Also check sprint result
      const sprintKey = p.race + '_sprint';
      const sprintResult = raceResults[sprintKey];
      if(sprintResult && p.season === 2026){
        const sprintRace = CAL_2026.find(r => String(r.r) === String(p.race));
        if(sprintRace?.sprint){
          const ss = scorePick(p.picks, sprintResult);
          if(ss){
            // Sprint uses half points: P1=3,P2=2,P3=1, partial=0
            let sTotal = 0;
            ss.breakdown.forEach((b,i)=>{if(b.status==='exact')sTotal+=([3,2,1][i]||0);});
            if(sTotal>0){
              totalPts += sTotal;
              scoredRaces++;
              raceBreakdown.push({race:p.race+'s', raceName:(p.raceName||'')+'(Sprint)', pts:sTotal, breakdown:ss.breakdown, picks:p.picks, isSprint:true});
            }
          }
        }
      }
    });
    const accuracy = scoredRaces>0 ? Math.round((totalPts/(scoredRaces*10))*100) : null;
    return {...m, totalPts, scoredRaces, accuracy, raceBreakdown, predCount:myPreds.length};
  }).sort((a,b)=>b.totalPts-a.totalPts||b.predCount-a.predCount);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  UTILS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const pad=n=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const esc=s=>String(s||'').replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');
const fmtDate=d=>new Date(d+'T12:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US',{weekday:'short',month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});
const fmtShort=d=>new Date(d).toLocaleDateString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric',year:'numeric'});


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  TOP PROGRESS BAR
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
const TopBar = {
  _timer: null,
  _w: 0,
  start() {
    const el = document.getElementById('topBar');
    if (!el) return;
    el.className = 'active';
    this._w = 0;
    el.style.width = '0';
    clearInterval(this._timer);
    this._timer = setInterval(() => {
      this._w = Math.min(this._w + (Math.random() * 5), 85);
      el.style.width = this._w + '%';
    }, 200);
  },
  done() {
    const el = document.getElementById('topBar');
    if (!el) return;
    clearInterval(this._timer);
    el.style.width = '100%';
    setTimeout(() => { el.className = 'done'; setTimeout(() => { el.className = ''; el.style.width = '0'; }, 500); }, 200);
  }
};

// ─── TEAM COLOR LOOKUP ─────────────────────────────────────────
function driverTeamColor(abbr) {
  const d = DRIVERS_2026.find(x => x.a === abbr);
  return d ? d.c : '#4a4a5a';
}

// ─── COPY INVITE ON DASHBOARD ──────────────────────────────────
function copyDashInvite() {
  const url = window.location.href.split('?')[0].split('#')[0];
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => {
    const btn = document.querySelector('.ref-btn[onclick="copyDashInvite()"]');
    if (btn) { const orig = btn.innerHTML; btn.innerHTML = '✓ Copied!'; setTimeout(() => btn.innerHTML = orig, 1800); }
  }).catch(() => {
    prompt('Copy this link:', url);
  });
}

// ─── RACE WEEKEND LOCK ─────────────────────────────────────────
// A race weekend is considered "started" when the race is within 2 days
function isRaceWeekendStarted() {
  const now = new Date();
  const next = nextRaceData;
  if (!next) return false;
  const raceTime = new Date(next.date + 'T' + (next.time || '13:00:00Z'));
  // Lock 2 days before race (FP1 typically starts Thu/Fri)
  const lockTime = new Date(raceTime.getTime() - 2 * 24 * 3600 * 1000);
  return now >= lockTime;
}

function updatePredLockState() {
  const locked = isRaceWeekendStarted();
  const btn = document.getElementById('lockBtn');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('lockOverlay');
  if (!btn || !overlay) return;
  // Only apply if user hasn't already locked in (checkExisting handles that)
  if (locked && !btn.disabled) {
    btn.disabled = true;
    btn.textContent = '🔒 Picks Locked — Race Weekend';
    overlay.style.display = 'block';
    ['pick1','pick2','pick3'].forEach(id => { const s = document.getElementById(id); if(s) s.disabled = true; });
    const dnf = document.getElementById('dnfPick'); if(dnf) dnf.disabled = true;
  } else if (!locked) {
    overlay.style.display = 'none';
  }
}

// ─── DNF SCORING ───────────────────────────────────────────────
// +2 bonus if user predicted DNF and any of P1/P2/P3 is in fact not in the result
// We detect a DNF prediction by the picks.dnf flag
function scoreDNFBonus(picks, result) {
  if (!picks.dnf || !result || !result.length) return 0;
  // "DNF in top 3" is true if fewer than 3 classified finishers or if any predicted driver is missing
  // Simplified: award bonus if the actual result has any driver NOT from DRIVERS_2026 top names
  // In practice: if someone predicted DNF and the real result only has 2 drivers in top 3 (rare),
  // OR simply: if any of the user's picked drivers is missing from result (they DNF'd)
  const pickedInResult = picks.slice(0,3).filter(d => result.includes(d));
  const anyDNF = pickedInResult.length < picks.slice(0,3).length;
  return anyDNF ? 2 : 0;
}

// ─── SPRINT SCORING ────────────────────────────────────────────
const SPRINT_SCORING = {P1: 3, P2: 2, P3: 1}; // half points for sprint

async function fetchSprintResults() {
  const sprintRounds = CAL_2026.filter(r => r.sprint);
  for (const race of sprintRounds) {
    const key = race.r + '_sprint';
    if (raceResults[key]) continue;
    const now = new Date();
    const raceDate = new Date(race.date + 'T' + race.time);
    // Sprint is usually ~26h before main race
    const sprintTime = new Date(raceDate.getTime() - 26 * 3600 * 1000);
    if (now < sprintTime) continue;
    try {
      const res = await fetch(\`\${JOLPICA}/2026/\${race.r}/sprint.json\`, {signal: AbortSignal.timeout(8000)});
      if (!res.ok) continue;
      const d = await res.json();
      const results = d?.MRData?.RaceTable?.Races?.[0]?.SprintResults;
      if (results && results.length >= 3) {
        raceResults[key] = results.slice(0,3).map(r => r.Driver.code || r.Driver.familyName.substring(0,3).toUpperCase());
      }
    } catch(_) {}
  }
}

// ─── FIRESTORE RESULT CACHING ──────────────────────────────────
async function cacheResultsToFirestore() {
  if (!firebaseOk || !db) return;
  try {
    const data = {};
    for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(raceResults)) {
      data[key] = val;
    }
    if (Object.keys(data).length) {
      await db.collection('meta').doc('cachedResults').set(data, {merge: true});
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Failed to cache results:', e.message); }
}

async function loadCachedResults() {
  if (!firebaseOk || !db) return;
  try {
    const snap = await db.collection('meta').doc('cachedResults').get();
    if (snap.exists) {
      const data = snap.data();
      for (const [key, val] of Object.entries(data)) {
        if (!raceResults[key]) raceResults[key] = val; // don't overwrite fresh API data
      }
    }
  } catch(e) { console.warn('Failed to load cached results:', e.message); }
}

// ─── RESULTS PENDING STATE ─────────────────────────────────────
function isResultPending(raceR) {
  const race = CAL_2026.find(r => r.r === String(raceR));
  if (!race) return false;
  const raceEnd = new Date(race.date + 'T' + race.time);
  raceEnd.setHours(raceEnd.getHours() + 3); // ~3h after race start
  const now = new Date();
  return now > raceEnd && !raceResults[String(raceR)];
}

// ─── AUDIT LOG ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
async function logAudit(action, details) {
  if (!firebaseOk || !db) return;
  try {
    await db.collection('auditLog').add({
      ts: Date.now(),
      uid: currentUser?.id || 'unknown',
      uname: currentUser?.name || 'unknown',
      action,
      details,
      time: new Date().toISOString()
    });
  } catch(e) {}
}

async function loadAuditLog() {
  const el = document.getElementById('auditLog');
  if (!el) return;
  if (!firebaseOk || !db) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="ltxt">Audit log requires Firebase</div>';
    return;
  }
  try {
    const snap = await db.collection('auditLog').orderBy('ts', 'desc').limit(40).get();
    if (snap.empty) { el.innerHTML = '<div class="ltxt">No audit entries yet.</div>'; return; }
    el.innerHTML = '';
    snap.docs.forEach(doc => {
      const d = doc.data();
      const div = document.createElement('div');
      div.className = 'audit-entry';
      div.innerHTML = \`<span class="ae-time">\${new Date(d.ts).toLocaleString('en-US',{month:'short',day:'numeric',hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}</span> · <span class="ae-user">\${esc(d.uname)}</span> · \${esc(d.action)}\${d.details ? ' · <span class="ae-race">'+esc(d.details)+'</span>' : ''}\`;
      el.appendChild(div);
    });
  } catch(e) {
    el.innerHTML = '<div class="ltxt">Failed to load audit log.</div>';
  }
}

// ─── BULK RESULT SAVE ──────────────────────────────────────────
function populateBulkSelects() {
  const raceSel = document.getElementById('bulkRaceSel');
  if (!raceSel || raceSel.options.length > 1) return;
  CAL_2026.forEach(r => {
    const o = document.createElement('option');
    o.value = r.r;
    o.textContent = \`R\${r.r} · \${r.name.replace(' Grand Prix', '')}\`;
    raceSel.appendChild(o);
  });
  ['bulkP1','bulkP2','bulkP3'].forEach(id => {
    const s = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!s) return;
    DRIVERS_2026.forEach(d => {
      const o = document.createElement('option');
      o.value = d.a;
      o.textContent = \`\${d.a} · \${d.n}\`;
      s.appendChild(o);
    });
  });
}

async function saveBulkResult() {
  const r = document.getElementById('bulkRaceSel')?.value;
  const p1 = document.getElementById('bulkP1')?.value;
  const p2 = document.getElementById('bulkP2')?.value;
  const p3 = document.getElementById('bulkP3')?.value;
  const msgEl = document.getElementById('bulkMsg');

  const showMsg = (txt, type) => {
    if (!msgEl) return;
    msgEl.textContent = txt;
    msgEl.className = 'bulk-msg ' + type;
    msgEl.style.display = 'block';
    setTimeout(() => msgEl.style.display = 'none', 3000);
  };

  if (!r) return showMsg('⚠ Select a race.', 'err');
  if (!p1 || !p2 || !p3) return showMsg('⚠ Select all 3 drivers.', 'err');
  if (new Set([p1,p2,p3]).size < 3) return showMsg('⚠ Drivers must be unique.', 'err');

  const result = [p1, p2, p3];
  raceResults[r] = result;

  if (firebaseOk && db) {
    try {
      await db.collection('meta').doc('cachedResults').set({ [r]: result }, {merge: true});
      await logAudit('BULK_RESULT', \`R\${r}: \${result.join(' › ')}\`);
      showMsg('✓ Result saved and cached.', 'ok');
    } catch(e) {
      showMsg('⚠ Saved locally only (Firebase error).', 'err');
    }
  } else {
    showMsg('✓ Result saved locally.', 'ok');
  }
}

// ─── FORM GUIDE RENDER ─────────────────────────────────────────
function renderFormGuide(membersList, predsList) {
  const grid = document.getElementById('formGrid');
  const title = document.getElementById('formGuideTitle');
  if (!grid) return;

  // Find completed races (have results)
  const completedRaces = Object.keys(raceResults)
    .filter(k => !k.includes('_sprint') && raceResults[k])
    .sort((a,b) => Number(a)-Number(b));

  const last5 = completedRaces.slice(-5);
  if (last5.length === 0) { grid.style.display = 'none'; if(title) title.style.display = 'none'; return; }

  grid.style.display = '';
  if(title) title.style.display = '';

  const lb = calcLeaderboard(membersList, predsList);
  grid.innerHTML = '';

  lb.forEach(m => {
    const pts5 = last5.map(r => {
      const pred = predsList.find(p => p.mid === m.id && String(p.race) === String(r) && p.season === 2026);
      if (!pred) return null;
      const result = raceResults[r];
      if (!result) return null;
      const scored = scorePick(pred.picks, result);
      if (!scored) return null;
      let total = scored.total;
      if (pred.dnf) total += scoreDNFBonus(pred.picks, result);
      return total;
    });

    const maxH = 32;
    const maxPts = 10;
    const bars = pts5.map((pts, i) => {
      const race = CAL_2026.find(r => r.r === last5[i]);
      const raceName = (race?.name || 'R'+last5[i]).replace(' Grand Prix','').substring(0,3).toUpperCase();
      if (pts === null) {
        return \`<div class="form-bar-wrap"><div class="form-bar" style="height:2px;background:var(--border2)"></div><div class="form-bar-lbl">\${raceName}</div></div>\`;
      }
      const h = Math.max(4, Math.round((pts / maxPts) * maxH));
      const color = pts >= 8 ? 'var(--green)' : pts >= 5 ? 'var(--gold)' : pts >= 1 ? 'var(--orange)' : 'var(--muted)';
      return \`<div class="form-bar-wrap"><div class="form-bar" style="height:\${h}px;background:\${color}" title="\${pts}pts"></div><div class="form-bar-lbl">\${raceName}</div></div>\`;
    }).join('');

    const scored5 = pts5.filter(p => p !== null);
    const sum5 = scored5.reduce((a,b) => a+b, 0);
    const avg5 = scored5.length > 0 ? (sum5 / scored5.length).toFixed(1) : '—';

    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'form-card';
    card.innerHTML = \`
      <div class="form-header">
        <div class="form-av" style="background:\${avCol(m.name)}">\${m.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase()}</div>
        <div>
          <div class="form-name">\${esc(m.name)}</div>
          <div style="font-family:'Share Tech Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:1px">Avg last 5: \${avg5}pts</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-bars">\${bars}</div>
      <div class="form-total">\${sum5}pts in last \${scored5.length} race\${scored5.length !== 1 ? 's' : ''}</div>
    \`;
    grid.appendChild(card);
  });
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function init(){
  setLoadTxt('INITIALISING FIREBASE…');
  initFirebase();

  setLoadTxt('LOADING MEMBER DATA…');
  members=await dbGetMembers();

  // Auto-login from remembered session
  const sess=LS.get('apex26_session');
  if(sess?.remember && sess?.id){
    currentUser=members.find(m=>m.id===sess.id)||null;
  }

  setLoadTxt('READY');
  await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,300));
  document.getElementById('loadOverlay').classList.add('hidden');

  if(currentUser){
    const bar=document.getElementById('welcome-bar');
    if(bar){bar.textContent='👋 Welcome back, '+currentUser.name.split(' ')[0]+'!';bar.style.display='block';}
    setTimeout(enterApp,400);
  } else {
    document.getElementById('authView').classList.add('active');
    // Hint email for returning user
    const sess2=LS.get('apex26_session');
    if(sess2?.id){const m=members.find(x=>x.id===sess2.id);if(m)document.getElementById('li-email').value=m.email;}
  }
}

function setLoadTxt(t){const el=document.getElementById('loadTxt');if(el)el.textContent=t;}

init();
</script>
</body>
</html>
